C[shogo.inamoto: Him let's enjoy this game:)
matburt: glad to have you hear on Nova.  What do you think of the site?
matburt: glad to have you hear on Nova.  What do you think of the site?
matburt: Excellent... well if you have any feedback we are certainly happy to hear it
C[shogo.inamoto: Please let Japanese people use this site by translating.
C[matburt: Actually we would love to... we need some help translating, though, as we do not know the language
C[matburt: Do you think that would help adoption?
shogo.inamoto: Yes. Japanese could play game but they would feel uncomfortable even they can understand English.
matburt: well we certainly don't want them to feel uncomfortable
shogo.inamoto: Isn't there anyone use Japanese? Maybe I could help in some way.
matburt: It's just us two developer (myself and anoek).  If you could help in any way we'd really appreciate it
C[shogo.inamoto: My English is not so good, but I would love to help.
C[matburt: It's certainly better than my japanese... what parts of the site do you think are most important to translate?
C[shogo.inamoto: I thinks, just upper menu and F.A.Q context at the moment.
matburt: yeah... and maybe the game buttons here and info text
C[shogo.inamoto: Anyway this service is really grate. Thank you for develpment.
matburt: you seem like you are a pretty experienced player... do you think a site like this could do well translated given the traditional services that are popular in japan?
matburt: Hey no problem... like I said, it's great to have you here

C[shogo.inamoto: >do you think a site like this could do well translated given the traditional services that are popular in japan?       I'm sorry I can't understand what you said. Could you say in other explanation?
C[matburt: japanese go players tend to prefer to play using different go servers
matburt: we'd like to appeal to them with a site translation
C[matburt: is it possible to get them to give up the traditional servers for a new one?
shogo.inamoto: Yes, Absolutely. This site has lots of unique features.
shogo.inamoto: Like free servie, SNS signup system.
shogo.inamoto: And, this, long running game is good for busy people.
C[matburt: true... I do like long games.  It gives me more time to write features for the site :)
matburt: We have a tournament system that we are working on now that I think you'd like a lot
C[shogo.inamoto: Sounds good. I will tell my all IGO friends this site.
C[shogo.inamoto: If you need help, don't hesitate to contact with me.
C[matburt: Thanks... I guess the best help is to spread the word and use us to play some games :)
C[shogo.inamoto: I will be a heavy user^^
shogo.inamoto: I am actually a developer of GO app for smartphone as well. Although I'm a beginner, could release one for iPhone:)
shogo.inamoto: Not good quality, but there are few users:)
shogo.inamoto: You two are awesome developer. I respect you^^
matburt: I really appreciate you saying that!
matburt: I'm actually an IOS and Android developer also
matburt: Unfortunately I am a better programmer than I am Go player :)
shogo.inamoto: App name is IGONOTE that save game data(kifu)
C[shogo.inamoto: I created it as an internship at IT company. I've started programming there since last April.
shogo.inamoto: When did you begin to play IGO?
matburt: hehe, about august of this last year
matburt: anoek and I started about the same time... we've been playing chess for a while
matburt: we wanted a good site to play on and couldn't find anything that we liked... so we decided to build this one
matburt: we were surprised at how challenging of a game it is
C[shogo.inamoto: It's been only a few months since you started! And you now built this excellent one! You are so addicted to this game hehe
matburt: I thought building this site would help me get better... but I need to study a lot more
matburt: We definitely want to spread the word... there are too few players in the US and Canada
shogo.inamoto: I've been in Canada for almost 9 month to study English but I couldn't find only one place to play this game.
matburt: How long have you been studying Go to be a 6d?
shogo.inamoto: Three or Four years maybe.
shogo.inamoto: Started since I was twelve years old. Now 23 years old. My level is same old same old...
matburt: have you played in a lot of tournaments?
C[shogo.inamoto: Actually I wanted to professional and studied for that for one year.
C[matburt: I bet that helped a lot?
matburt: igo is very big in japan?
C[shogo.inamoto: You know manga ""Hikaru no Go"" right?
matburt: I actually have seen that!
matburt: Though I have not read it a whole lot
C[shogo.inamoto: It's so fun to read! I read it over and over.
matburt: I'm going to give it more time
matburt: I do find it very interesting
C[matburt: It's time for bed for me... can we finish this tomorrow?
matburt: I'd love to play a larger game with you too
shogo.inamoto: Yes sure! Anytime! I'd love to play with you too.
